_note: Target-system topology + admission for src/experimental/prototype/target/factory/. Selects catalogue + workflow, sets ports / admission caps / timeouts. Trial-level knobs (n_requests, request_rate_per_s, consumer_pool_size, kind_probability) live in `data/config/method/experimental.json::trial`; controller + strategy knobs live in `data/config/method/prototype/controller.json`. `target_granularity` picks collapsed (1 composite + 7 atomics) vs expanded (adds 5 internal-stage atomics TAS_{2..6}); `inject_internal_stage_mu` only affects those framework atomics, third-party atomics always sleep on mu.

workflows._note: Two on-disk workflow files, one per architectural view. The orchestrator picks `collapsed` or `expanded` based on `target_granularity` and threads the chosen stem into the TAS_1 factory.

stage_routes._note: Used only when target_granularity='expanded'. Per-stage metadata for the TAS_{2..6} atomic factories: which third-party kind each stage calls and with what operation name. The dispatch graph TAS_1 walks lives in workflow/tas_expanded.json, not here.

_note_ready_timeout: Bumped from 20s to 90s because each iteration of the experimental grid now spawns up to ~32 uvicorn / waitress worker processes (8 services x w=4 workers in collapsed, 13 x w=4 in expanded). The host CPU thrashes during the cold-start storm so individual workers can take 30s+ to pass /healthz under load.
